components.name: App
components.purpose: Root application shell, layout management, and core business logic.
responsibilities: Global state management for requests and user preferences

components.name: LiveTracking
components.purpose: Visualizes the lifecycle of an active service request.

components.name: MockMap
components.purpose: Decorative simulation of geographic location and provider movement.

components.name: ErrorBoundary
components.purpose: Catches runtime JavaScript errors to prevent application crashes.
components.fallback: Standardized error message and reset button

missingComponents: In-app Chat Component (For communication with providers)
recommendations: Abstract internal App.tsx components into separate files in src/components/ for better maintainability.
Implement a Design System / Component Library (e.g., Shadcn UI) to standardize UI elements.
Add unit tests for each component using Vitest and React Testing Library.
Implement Skeleton loaders for better perceived performance during simulations.
